questions.q: What is the capital of Japan?

Which blood type is known as the universal donor?
How many planets are in our solar system?
What is the derivative of xˣ with respect to x?

Which is heavier: a cubic foot of gold or a cubic foot of feathers?
choices: Feathers — gold is measured in lighter troy ounces
It depends on how the feathers are packed

questions.q: A woman has 7 daughters, and each daughter has exactly 1 brother. How many children does the woman have?
A frog at the bottom of a 20-foot well climbs 4 feet each day and slides back 3 feet each night. How many days to escape?
In the English alphabet, what letter comes immediately before the letter that immediately follows M?
A rock and a feather are dropped simultaneously from the same height on the airless Moon. Which hits the ground first?
choices: They land at the same time
The feather — the Moon has weaker gravity

questions.q: There are 30 people in a room. Approximately what is the probability that at least two share a birthday?
What is 8% of 200 added to 200% of 8?
Two boys are born on the same day, in the same year, to the same parents, but are not twins. How?
choices: They are part of a set of triplets or more
The question is a trick — they must be twins
